impl.spec_text:
proof fn test(x: u32, y: u32, z:u32, m:int) by(integer_ring) // FAILS (not supported)
            requires
              m != 0,
              (x-y) % m == 0
            ensures
              (x*z - y*z) % m == 0
        {}
